description: Wisconsin DOA publishes annual population estimates for all municipalities. Greenville has grown rapidly since incorporation in 2021, reflecting broader Fox Cities regional growth.
pendingNote: Registered source — annual population figure extraction pending

description: The Village GIS hub and 2040 Comprehensive Land Use Plan document zoning districts, comprehensive plan tiers, and future land use designations. Zoning map amendments are tracked in the Public Records index.
pendingNote: Registered source — detailed parcel data extraction pending

description: Tax Increment Financing (TIF) districts are used by the Village to support economic development. TID District No. 1 was amended in 2026 via Resolution No. 13-26.
pendingNote: District boundaries and financials to be sourced from official TIF reports

description: The Village Bicycle and Pedestrian Plan documents non-motorized transportation infrastructure. Road network data is available via the GIS hub and Outagamie County.
pendingNote: Registered source — transportation network data extraction pending

description: The Comprehensive Outdoor Recreation Plan 2026–2030 (Resolution No. 6-26) governs Village park planning through 2030. Park locations are available via the GIS hub.
pendingNote: Registered source — park inventory and plan details extraction pending

description: The Village operates a municipal water and wastewater system. Master plans govern long-range infrastructure investment for both systems.
pendingNote: Registered sources — document URLs and system data extraction pending

description: Village Public Works covers street maintenance, snow removal, and infrastructure operations. Department information is available via the Village staff directory.
pendingNote: Registered source — Public Works data and budget information extraction pending

description: Village GIS data is available via the ArcGIS Hub and Outagamie County GIS. Layers include parcels, zoning, future land use, and infrastructure.
pendingNote: Registered sources — ArcGIS REST API integration planned

description: Development activity — CSMs, special exceptions, rezoning, and permit records — is tracked through Village Legal Notices, Board minutes, and the sub-area planning documents.
pendingNote: Registered source — development permit and CSM data extraction in progress via Legal Notices monitoring
